Details: Both outputs provide comprehensive test case specifications for DBT functionality testing. Comprehensive_DBT_Tester focuses on general DBT query validation with a robust pytest framework but incomplete test implementations. SqlServer_to_DBT_Conversion_Tester provides specific SQL Server to DBT conversion testing with complete pytest implementations. The outputs serve different but complementary testing purposes in the DBT ecosystem.

Both outputs address DBT testing but with different focal points. Comprehensive_DBT_Tester covers general query validation (total orders, spending calculations, performance testing) while SqlServer_to_DBT_Conversion_Tester focuses specifically on conversion validation (table references, syntax compatibility, materialization). The semantic overlap is in DBT testing domain but diverges in specific testing objectives.

Both follow similar structural patterns: numbered test cases with ID, description, and expected outcomes, followed by pytest implementations. Comprehensive_DBT_Tester uses more sophisticated fixture setup (lines 20-35) while SqlServer_to_DBT_Conversion_Tester uses direct file reading approach. Both maintain consistent test case formatting and pytest decorations.
